mainEntity.name: What is the due date for income tax return filing?

acceptedAnswer.text: 31 July for individuals and non-audit cases. 31 October for businesses requiring audit. 30 November for transfer pricing cases. Belated returns can be filed until 31 December of the assessment year with a late fee of Rs 5,000.

mainEntity.name: Should I choose the old or new tax regime?

acceptedAnswer.text: The choice depends on your deductions and exemptions. If your total deductions (80C, 80D, HRA, home loan) exceed Rs 3-4 lakhs, the old regime may be beneficial. We compute tax under both regimes and recommend the optimal choice.

mainEntity.name: Do you handle NRI income tax returns from Chennai?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. We file NRI returns with DTAA benefit claims, foreign tax credit computation, NRO/NRE income treatment, and capital gains on Indian property sales. We also handle Section 195 TDS certificates for NRI property transactions.
